title: selaginella doederleinii
intro: Selaginella doederleinii, also known as the creeping spikemoss or Chinese spikemoss, is a type of ancient plant species that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its unique, scale-like leaves and ability to thrive in humid environments. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella doederleinii include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Selaginella doederleinii is often combined with other medicinal plants to create teas, infusions, and poultices that are used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
